parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001', max_tokens: 256, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'You are a business intelligence assistant. Based on this website text from ' + $json.business_name + ' (' + $json.domain + '), extract the owner or founder name if clearly stated. RULES: Return ONLY valid JSON, no explanation. owner_name is the full name string, or empty string if not found. Do not guess - only extract names that are explicitly stated. Website text: ' + ($json.page_text || '') + ' Respond with JSON only: {"owner_name": "Name or empty", "confidence": "high|medium|low"}' }] }) }}

meta.note: Hybrid pipeline: local Python scraper POSTs each lead to this webhook. Claude Haiku extracts the owner name, Build Row assembles the full record, Google Sheets appends-or-updates the row (matched on maps_url, so re-runs do not duplicate), and the owner name is returned to the scraper. After import: (1) set the Anthropic API Key HTTP Header Auth credential (header x-api-key), (2) set the Google Sheets OAuth2 credential and pick your spreadsheet + sheet tab, (3) activate and copy the Production webhook URL into config.yaml under n8n.webhook_url.
